form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by 1.3 lengths at this track (24.63) beating Rosa's Autumn in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Back in great order and makes plenty of appeal again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished last on February 22 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Gordon Keeping beaten 28 lengths (31.90) in a Grade 6. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Took an awkward stride leaving the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 6 on April 1 over 407m at this track behind Boonie's Baby beaten 8 lengths (24.51). More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 4 for the first time after finishing a 9 length fifth at Q Lakeside (26.52) in a Grade 6. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 407m (24.24) beating Fiery Words in Maiden on April 5. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 2.5 lengths in 24.42, beating Dark End. Last start finished 7th on April 1 over 407m at this track behind Boonie's Baby beaten 42 lengths (26.91) in a Grade 6. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down, fell, regained footing on the first turn and completed the event.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (24.22) at this track. Jumps from the outside. Will need plenty of luck.
